summary: Gogs has Unauthenticated Asymmetric Denial of Service (DoS) via SSH Handshake Stall (File Descriptor Exhaustion) in gogs.io/gogs
details:
Gogs has Unauthenticated Asymmetric Denial of Service (DoS) via SSH Handshake Stall (File Descriptor Exhaustion) in gogs.io/gogs.

NOTE: The source advisory for this report contains additional versions that could not be automatically mapped to standard Go module versions.
